category_sources: Official Knative CLI docs describe kn as a CLI for creating Knative resources.
source_facts.description says it manages Knative Serving and Eventing resources.
display_name_sources: Official Knative docs refer to the CLI as kn.
docs_sources: Knative docs point to the kn documentation in GitHub.
Official Knative docs have a CLI tools page for kn.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/knative/client; per instruction, not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Knative docs say kn creates services and event sources and simplifies autoscaling and traffic splitting.
source_facts.description mentions Knative Serving and Eventing.
